name: higher-education-administration
description: Higher Education Administration specialist team — 6 agents covering the institutional operating model (governance, budget model, strategic enrollment, retention-vs-recruitment ROI), enrollment & financial aid (funnel, yield, Title IV aid, net tuition revenue), student success & retention (persistence, completion, early-alert), academic operations & compliance (registrar, accreditation, FERPA, scheduling), institutional research & analytics (IPEDS, data definitions, dashboards, model soundness), and academic program portfolio (program ROI, viability/sunset, credit-hour economics). Ships 8 skills, 6 commands, 4 templates, 12 best-practices, a 5-doc knowledge bank (decision trees + enrollment/retention/budget-portfolio/compliance references), a scenarios bank, an advisory anti-pattern hook, and a stdlib enrollment/retention/program calculator. Audience: provosts, VPs of enrollment, registrars, deans of students, institutional research, academic affairs. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
